description: Pierre Gasly reveals his Abu Dhabi helmet design in collaboration with Binance, expressing excitement about the unboxing and the unique features of the helmet, including its colors and Arabic designs.
topic_summary: In this video, Pierre Gasly showcases his new helmet for the Abu Dhabi race, highlighting its design elements and thanking participants from a helmet design contest with Binance. He emphasizes the blend of colors and personal touches in the design [t=59:57].
